Speaker: John Doe: Finance signed off on revisiting the Splunk connector in Q2 — not a PO today, but we can run a scoped evaluation and pricing refresh.
Speaker: Jane Smith: Good — we already proved the post-kubelet noisy finding class is contained; graph prioritization stayed stable after the last patch cycle.

Speaker: John Doe: Keep 100% Azure and Okta for SSO as the guardrail; procurement wants the Wiz Score at 92% narrative in the Q2 business case.
